content: G.helot wjeel is nice on her too
She needs the handsize
For the newbies out there

Brown WoDs (for Arc 1 only) 
BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils  

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle  

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

Exile - A Symptom / State Card can be sold in Shop instead of your Awakener's Command Cards

what that has to do with anything?
Realms can be mixed and Chaos mixes the best

chaos is probably the most flexible. Mouchette works in mono chaos, but she is really great  mixed with caro with a helot to support her. Kathigura also works in mono chaos but is probably strongest with ultra supports to back her up.

Tbh those are two of the more flexible characters in the game in terms of what supports you can run with them.

you actually don't deal less dmg in r99, you will just take more dmg from them

can someone recommend me a team? i just started and idk how to team build in this game. this is my team rn that someone recommened me but im wondering if i can build any other teams
I think it was me, for now, any team can works early chapters
Aequor is more newbie friendly but you might struggle to play them with goli or celeste being the only reasonable picks there
Celeste is a healer that can revive your team
And the revive can be repeated once every 6 turns
i wanna try making a caro team or a aequor team but i dont think i have that good of units for it rn
If she gets into E3
but the team i have rn is working with the rat killing everything
Faint is a good option but early game doesn't need revive or death resistance stats because the enemies are easy
So it's more like a brick than helpful, but later they are really useful
The other one i mentioned for aequor was goli but you're probably better with the current team than 1 aequor + 3 ultra
Well
You can also try them out too
You won't face many problem early game anyway
So it's a good way to learn which units does what
yeah i beat the second area with relative ease and im on to the third
Aequor is helpful for newbies because it have shield or more dmg from Tentacle, just change their colors
Don't forget you can click on the icons during battle
For aequor it's the tentacle
It allow you to change into white tentacle for shield or red tentacle for more dmg
You don't really have any other dd rn
As for caro it heals you

content: i explain every unit in here and also suggest Es
and explain how they are used

Castor is very flexible and can be used as a Generic Shielder for any Team, unlike Corposant whose gimmick is Aftershocking (or Discard-ing Cards to generate Perm Strength throughout the Battle,) you wanna Retain Castor's Plumes to Shield or play it off for additional Damage (which you would then use another Character with a Multi Hit or 1-0 Cost to proc the Corosion Stacks continuously, Poison also interacts with it iirc)
